gpt-4o-mini-transcribe.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists gpt-4o-mini-transcribe at an estimated $0.003/min with $1.25/1M input tokens and $5.00/1M output tokens. Stored hourly estimate is $0.18/hr. Batch discounts, enterprise agreements, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: OpenAI Audio API uploads are capped at 25 MB. Current public docs do not publish a fixed duration cap for this model, so AutoShow uses a conservative per-request audio budget to stay under model input limits.
